name: Hot Chocolate Master Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
Add 2 cups miniature marshmallows if desired.
2. Pour 1/3 of the mixture into an 8 oz. cold milk (shake quickly).
3. Pour 1/3 of the mixture into a coffee mug and add hot water for chocolate milk.
4. Pour 1/3 of the mixture into a coffee mug and add hot coffee for a Mocha.
